title: Device Request - Wall switch with plug and USB - _TZ3000_lqb7lcq9 / TS011F
excerpt:
### Prerequisites:

- Before requesting a device addition, please ensure there is not already a request for the device among the open issues.
- Make sure your Homey is upgraded to firmware v5 or higher.
- You need a physical example of the device.

### Device Information

- Device Name: `Nova Digital Switch + Plug+ USB`
- Device Model: `SA-WK`
- Device Description: `Wall mounted 1-gang Switch + Smart Plug + 2x USB (1x USB-A and 1x USB-C), derived from Tuya by Brazilian brand Nova Digital`
- Link to device image:
- [[Device Image]](https://www.novadigitalsmart.com.br/uploads/91_d0efc46ac9.jpg?w=1400&q=85)

### Notes:
- The `deviceImageLink` is the URL provided for the device image.
- The `endpoints` array contains detailed information about each endpoint, including `inputClusters` and `outputClusters`.
- The `manufacturerName` and `productId` are extracted from the `ids` section of the JSON.
- The `ieeeAddress` and `networkAddress` are also included for network identification.
